description: Unit: requireHuduFlag guard returns 404/501 when EE off or flag disabled, passes context when both on
Unit: client gating helper returns false by default when flag absent
Integration: CE build of /api/integrations/hudu/* returns 501 eeUnavailable
Integration: EE build resolves the real route (not 501) when flag on
Unit: client injects x-api-key header and base URL from resolved credentials
Unit: credential resolution prefers tenant secret, falls back to env, errors when neither present
Unit: pagination fetches multiple pages and stops at first page with < 25 items
Unit: pagination treats empty page as terminal and returns accumulated items
Unit: 429 triggers Retry-After-based backoff then succeeds; retries are capped
Unit: error mapping yields distinct typed results for 401/403/404/422/429/500
Unit: domain resource names map to asset_passwords/procedures endpoints
Unit: validateConnection returns ok + passwordAccess=false when asset_passwords probe is 403
Unit: thrown/returned errors never include the api key or any password value (redaction)
Migration: hudu_integrations created with expected columns, PK (tenant,integration_id), and updated_at trigger; down() drops it
Migration: table is distributed by tenant when Citus enabled; no-op safely when not
Integration: second connection for same tenant violates unique constraint / upserts rather than duplicates
Integration: connect stores base_url + api_key in secret provider and marks integration active
Integration: test action returns connected + capability for valid creds, error for invalid
Integration: getStatus never includes the api key in its payload
Integration: disconnect deletes secrets, sets inactive, and leaves existing mappings intact
Boundary: CE client-delete and tenant-delete paths never reference hudu_integrations (no error in CE); EE-only code/migrations own its deletes
Boundary: deleting a client removes its hudu mapping rows from tenant_external_entity_mappings (shared CE table) in CE without touching hudu_integrations
Component: Hudu item only renders in Settings>Integrations under IT Documentation when EE+flag
Component: settings panel renders base URL + masked key fields and Test/Connect/Disconnect
Component: status badge reflects Not connected / Connected / Error and password-access indicator
Component: submitting a blank key keeps the existing stored key; key is never pre-filled
Component: invalid base URL shows 404 message, invalid key shows 401 message
Integration: syncHuduCompanies fetches and caches the full paginated company list
Unit: matcher picks id_in_integration exact match over name match
Unit: matcher falls back to exact name then fuzzy name with lower confidence
Unit: matcher returns no suggestion when nothing crosses the fuzzy threshold
Integration: setHuduCompanyMapping writes a tenant_external_entity_mappings row with integration_type='hudu'
Integration: mapping a second Hudu company to an already-mapped client is rejected/replaced per one-to-one rule
Integration: getHuduCompanyMappings returns companies with mapping + suggestion + mapped client name
Integration: clearHuduCompanyMapping removes the mapping row
Unit: client_id <-> hudu company id resolver works both directions and returns null when unmapped
Component: mapping manager shows counters and a row per Hudu company
Component: client picker is pre-filled with the suggested match and persists on change
Component: row badge shows Suggested/Mapped/Unmapped correctly
Component: Refresh companies re-pulls list and keeps confirmed mappings intact
Integration: getCompanyAssets resolves mapping and returns paginated Hudu assets for the company
Integration: getCompanyArticles returns Hudu articles for the company
Integration: getCompanyPasswords returns only name/username/url/id and omits any password value field
Integration: second call within TTL hits cache; Refresh invalidates and re-fetches
Unit: deep-link builder produces per-record url and /companies/jump fallback
Integration: getCompanyPasswords returns a typed no-password-permission state on 403 instead of throwing
Integration: revealHuduPassword does a single live GET, returns the value transiently, and writes nothing to DB, Vault, or cache
Integration: each reveal writes an audit entry (who/when/which) that never contains the value; the value is never logged
Integration: revealHuduPassword on a key lacking password permission returns a 403 state, not the value
Integration: fetch for an unmapped client returns an unmapped state, no Hudu call made
Component: client Hudu tab hidden unless EE+flag and client mapped + connected
Component: assets and articles sections render rows with counts and deep-links
Component: empty/error states for not-connected, unmapped, unreachable
Component: Hudu source attribution is visible on the tab
Component: a separate 'Passwords' tab appears on the Client page only when EE+flag, Hudu connected, and client mapped (hidden otherwise)
Component: Passwords tab lists the company's Hudu credentials (name/username/url) with a count and no values
Component: Reveal triggers a live fetch and shows the value masked/reveal-on-click; Open-in-Hudu links out; the value is never written to any persistent store
Component: Passwords tab empty/error states for unmapped/disconnected/no-password-permission
Integration: manage actions (connect/disconnect/mapping) denied without system_settings.update
Integration: view-gated surfacing denied without system_settings.read
Integration: every Hudu route/action enforces EE + flag + system_settings RBAC
Static: no hardcoded user-facing strings in Hudu components; all keys resolve
Security regression: assert no Hudu password value is ever written to any DB table, Vault, cache, or log sink (reveal value transits only to the client)
Regression: disconnect then reconnect with a new key works and surfaces fresh data
Regression: tenant A cannot read tenant B Hudu connection, mappings, or fetched data
Regression: Hudu unreachable / timeout degrades every surface to an error state without crashing
Regression: removing a client's mapping immediately empties its Hudu tab and its client Passwords tab
